en.extract:
The lowland sooty boubou (Laniarius leucorhynchus), also known as the sooty boubou, is a species of bird in the family Malaconotidae.  It is native to the African tropical rainforest.  Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist shrubland.

The '''lowland sooty boubou''' ('''''Laniarius leucorhynchus'''''), also known as the '''sooty boubou''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Malaconotidae]].  It is native to the [[Tropical and subtropical moist broadleaf forests|African tropical rainforest]].  Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]] and [[subtropical or tropical moist shrubland]].
